install.windows_download: Open https://www.codebuddy.cn/work/ in the browser, click the Windows download. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default.
install.macos_download: Open https://www.codebuddy.cn/work/ in the browser, click the macOS download (.dmg). Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux: Not supported. WorkBuddy is Windows / macOS only.
install.note: WorkBuddy (腾讯 CodeBuddy 办公版) is a GUI desktop application. Prefer winget on Windows; otherwise tell the user the download location and ask them to follow the install wizard themselves.

install_flow.summary: Download installer → user double-clicks → user clicks through the install wizard
agent_steps: Detect OS first. WorkBuddy supports Windows and macOS only.
Windows: prefer `winget install --id Tencent.WorkBuddy --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements` if winget is available.

macOS / Windows manual: download the installer to ~/Downloads (or %USERPROFILE%\Downloads). There is no stable direct-download URL, so open https://www.codebuddy.cn/work/ and let the user click the download.
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Open the installer (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS).
Tell the user: 'WorkBuddy 安装向导已打开,请按向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'WorkBuddy installer opened — follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That they should click through the wizard themselves

identity_guard.description: WorkBuddy is 腾讯 (Tencent)'s GUI workplace AI-agent desktop app — the 办公版 of CodeBuddy. It is DIFFERENT from the CodeBuddy coding IDE: WorkBuddy reads its local model config from ~/.workbuddy/models.json, separate from CodeBuddy's ~/.codebuddy. winget id is Tencent.WorkBuddy (NOT Tencent.CodeBuddy).
